plugins.name: Apertura Cinématica Minimalista
plugins.description: Títulos elegantes con efectos de aparición suave, kerning dinámico y transición de salida fluida. 100% Vanilla JS.
plugins.author: Jonatan Barón

manifest.name: Apertura Cinématica Minimalista
manifest.description: Títulos elegantes con efectos de aparición suave, kerning dinámico y transición de salida fluida. 100% Vanilla JS.
manifest.author: Jonatan Barón

files.js: dvEngine.register({ awake: (ctx) => { ctx.refs.container = ctx.root.getElementById('opener-container'); ctx.refs.title = ctx.root.getElementById('main-title'); ctx.refs.subtitle = ctx.root.getElementById('sub-title'); ctx.refs.line = ctx.root.getElementById('accent-line'); }, update: (ctx) => { const { props, refs, timeline, utils } = ctx; const { container, title, subtitle, line } = refs; if (!container || !title || !subtitle || !line) return; title.innerText = props.title || 'DISEÑO MODULAR'; subtitle.innerText = props.subtitle || 'DV-ENGINE SERIES'; const ip = utils.clamp(timeline.introProgress, 0, 1); const kerning = utils.lerp(50, 20, utils.easeOutCubic(ip)); const spring = utils.spring(ip, 180, 18); container.style.opacity = ip.toString(); title.style.opacity = ip.toString(); title.style.letterSpacing = `${kerning}px`; title.style.transform = `translateY(${utils.lerp(40, 0, spring)}px)`; const subP = utils.clamp((ip - 0.3) / 0.7, 0, 1); subtitle.style.opacity = subP.toString(); subtitle.style.transform = `translateX(${utils.lerp(-20, 0, utils.easeOutCubic(subP))}px)`; const lineP = utils.clamp((ip - 0.4) / 0.6, 0, 1); const lineW = utils.lerp(0, 280, utils.easeOutCubic(lineP)); line.style.width = `${lineW}px`; if (timeline.isOutro) { const op = utils.clamp(timeline.outroProgress, 0, 1); container.style.opacity = (1 - op).toString(); container.style.transform = `scale(${utils.lerp(1, 0.95, utils.easeInOutCubic(op))})`; } } });

plugins.name: Widget de Reloj y Clima
plugins.description: Información en vivo de hora y temperatura para esquinas de pantalla. Ideal para transmisiones deportivas y eventos.
plugins.author: Jonatan Barón

manifest.name: Widget de Reloj y Clima
manifest.description: Información en vivo de hora y temperatura para esquinas de pantalla.
manifest.author: Jonatan Barón

files.html:
☀️
00:00
•
files.js: dvEngine.register({ awake: (ctx) => { ctx.refs.widget = ctx.root.getElementById('info-widget'); ctx.refs.time = ctx.root.getElementById('current-time'); ctx.refs.temp = ctx.root.getElementById('current-temp'); ctx.refs.loc = ctx.root.getElementById('current-location'); ctx.refs.wIcon = ctx.root.getElementById('weather-icon'); ctx._lastMinute = -1; }, update: (ctx) => { const { frame, props, refs, timeline, utils } = ctx; const { widget, time, temp, loc, wIcon } = refs; if (!widget) return; const now = new Date(); const minutes = now.getMinutes(); if (ctx._lastMinute !== minutes) { ctx._lastMinute = minutes; const hh = String(now.getHours()).padStart(2, '0'); const mm = String(minutes).padStart(2, '0'); if (time) time.innerText = `${hh}:${mm}`; } if (temp) temp.innerText = props.temp || '22°C'; if (loc) loc.innerText = props.location || 'MADRID, ES'; const ip = utils.clamp(timeline.introProgress, 0, 1); widget.style.opacity = ip.toString(); widget.style.transform = `translateY(${utils.lerp(-15, 0, utils.easeOutCubic(ip))}px)`; if (timeline.isOutro) { const op = utils.clamp(timeline.outroProgress, 0, 1); widget.style.opacity = (1 - op).toString(); widget.style.transform = `translateY(${utils.lerp(0, -15, utils.easeInOutCubic(op))}px)`; } } });

plugins.name: DVGE Studio Master
plugins.description: El lienzo definitivo para desarrolladores. Renderiza HTML, CSS y JS puro con sincronización total de frames y soporte para IA.
plugins.author: Jonatan Barón & Antigravity

schema.label: Estilos CSS
schema.defaultValue: #studio-root { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 100%; } #studio-title { color: var(--accent); font-size: 80px; font-weight: 900; margin: 0; } #studio-bar { width: 200px; height: 4px; background: white; margin-top: 10px; }

schema.label: Lógica JS
schema.defaultValue: window.renderDVGE = (frame, props, ctx) => { const title = ctx.root.getElementById('studio-title'); const bar = ctx.root.getElementById('studio-bar'); if (!title || !bar) return; const ip = ctx.timeline.introProgress; title.style.opacity = ip; title.style.transform = `translateY(${ctx.utils.lerp(20, 0, ip)}px)`; bar.style.width = `${ctx.utils.lerp(0, 400, ctx.utils.spring(ip))}px`; };

schema.label: Contexto para IA
schema.defaultValue:
# DVGE MASTER RULES
Eres un experto en animaciones para el Dynamic Vector Graphics Engine (DVGE).

## TU MISIÓN
Generar código HTML/CSS/JS optimizado para broadcast.

## REGLAS DE ORO
1. Usa siempre las variables proporcionadas en el contexto de proyecto.
2. Los artefactos deben ser llamados mediante getArtifact(ID).
3. Prioriza el rendimiento: usa transform y opacity para animaciones.
4. Mantén el estilo 'Luxury Broadcast' (minimalista, movimientos fluidos).

files.css: #dv-master-host { width: 100%; height: 100%; background: transparent; will-change: transform; contain: paint; } #dv-master-canvas { transform-origin: top left; }
files.js: dvEngine.register({ awake: (ctx) => { ctx.state.lastHtml = null; ctx.state.lastCss = null; ctx.state.lastJs = null; ctx.state.injectedFn = null; ctx.state.childCtx = null; ctx.refs.canvas = ctx.root.getElementById('dv-master-canvas'); ctx.refs.styleTag = ctx.root.getElementById('dv-master-styles'); }, update: (ctx) => { const { props, refs, state, frame } = ctx; if (!refs.canvas || !refs.styleTag) return; if (state.lastHtml !== props.htmlCode) { refs.canvas.innerHTML = props.htmlCode || ''; state.lastHtml = props.htmlCode; state.injectedFn = null; state.lastJs = null; } if (state.lastCss !== props.cssCode) { refs.styleTag.textContent = props.cssCode || ''; state.lastCss = props.cssCode; } const currentJs = (props.jsCode || '').trim(); if (currentJs && state.lastJs !== currentJs) { state.lastJs = currentJs; try { const sandbox = { renderDVGE: null }; const sandboxCode = `(function(sandbox, ctx) { "use strict"; const window = { renderDVGE: null }; ${currentJs} \n sandbox.renderDVGE = window.renderDVGE; })(arguments[0], arguments[1])`; const fn = new Function(sandboxCode); fn(sandbox, ctx); if (sandbox.renderDVGE) { state.injectedFn = sandbox.renderDVGE; state.childCtx = { ...ctx, state: {}, refs: {}, parent: ctx }; } } catch (e) { console.error('[Studio Master] JS Error:', e.message); } } if (state.injectedFn) { try { state.childCtx.frame = frame; state.childCtx.props = props; state.childCtx.timeline = ctx.timeline; state.injectedFn(frame, props, state.childCtx); } catch (e) {} } } });
